title: Preferences schema and Phase 2 settings UI
action: Expose the new config schema in Tauri/Vue preferences while keeping the frontend stack minimal.
implementation: Update TypeScript interfaces for dangerous_confirmation and menu dangerous flag.
Render Phase 2 action toggles using existing Vue SFC style.
Render a dangerous confirmation toggle defaulting to on.
Keep debug action visible only as part of the same menu list or a small diagnostics action; avoid introducing Pinia unless state becomes shared across multiple components.
Update Tauri command types only if Rust schema changes require it; save/load remains the same commands.
